changeSet.author: healthdata
changeSet.comment: Create composite indexes for tenant isolation across all schemas

changeSet.author: healthdata
changeSet.comment: Create additional performance indexes for common queries

changeSet.author: healthdata
changeSet.comment: Create GIN indexes on JSONB columns for efficient JSON queries

changeSet.author: healthdata
changeSet.comment: Create indexes optimized for date range queries

changeSet.author: healthdata
changeSet.comment: Create indexes for full-text search and code lookups

changeSet.author: healthdata
changeSet.comment: Create indexes for audit log search and filtering
